disclaimer: Prototype only. Product categories, copy, pricing, and recommendation logic require regulatory, legal, manufacturer, and clinical review before use. Do not treat this as a finished ecommerce catalog.
principles: Keep prescription treatment out of ecommerce. Prescription items require a completed visit, clinician review, and a patient-specific prescription.
Keep owned white-label products cosmetic unless deliberately launching a compliant OTC drug product.
Use affiliate links first for OTC drug categories such as sunscreen, acne medications, dandruff shampoos, antiperspirants, antifungals, wart removers, and minoxidil.
Do not imply supportive cosmetic products diagnose, treat, cure, prevent, or mitigate a disease.
Place affiliate disclosure close to affiliate recommendations, not only in the footer.
Supplements are delayed unless substantiation, DSHEA disclaimer, claim notification, adverse-event process, and manufacturing/quality review are completed.

ownedWhiteLabel.name: Gentle Cleanser
ownedWhiteLabel.claimSafeCopy: Fragrance-free, non-stripping cleanser for daily use.

ownedWhiteLabel.name: Barrier Moisturizer
ownedWhiteLabel.claimSafeCopy: Comfortable daily hydration for dry or sensitive-feeling skin.

ownedWhiteLabel.name: Oil-Free Moisturizer
ownedWhiteLabel.claimSafeCopy: Lightweight hydration for oily or combination skin.

ownedWhiteLabel.name: Rough-Feeling Skin Body Lotion
ownedWhiteLabel.claimSafeCopy: Daily body hydration that helps skin feel smoother and less dry.

ownedWhiteLabel.name: Calm-Looking Serum
ownedWhiteLabel.claimSafeCopy: Lightweight layer for skin that looks easily flushed or feels reactive.

affiliateOnly.name: Mineral Sunscreen SPF 30+
affiliateOnly.claimSafeCopy: Broad-spectrum sunscreen used as directed with other sun-protective measures.
affiliateOnly.reasonAffiliateFirst: Sunscreen is an OTC drug category in the U.S.; use established compliant products before building your own.

affiliateOnly.name: Tinted Mineral Sunscreen
affiliateOnly.claimSafeCopy: Tinted broad-spectrum sunscreen option for daily photoprotection routines.
affiliateOnly.reasonAffiliateFirst: Regulated sunscreen category; color/tint and claims require additional review.

affiliateOnly.name: Medicated Dandruff Shampoo
affiliateOnly.claimSafeCopy: Third-party medicated shampoo category for scalp flaking routines when appropriate.
affiliateOnly.reasonAffiliateFirst: Dandruff/seborrheic dermatitis treatment claims make this an OTC drug category.

affiliateOnly.name: OTC Acne Wash
affiliateOnly.claimSafeCopy: Third-party OTC acne medication category, separate from prescription care.
affiliateOnly.reasonAffiliateFirst: Benzoyl peroxide and salicylic acid acne claims are OTC drug territory.

affiliateOnly.name: Clinical-Strength Antiperspirant
affiliateOnly.claimSafeCopy: Third-party antiperspirant category used as directed for sweat support.
affiliateOnly.reasonAffiliateFirst: Antiperspirants are OTC drug/cosmetic products; avoid owning at launch.

affiliateOnly.name: OTC Antifungal Cream
affiliateOnly.claimSafeCopy: Third-party OTC antifungal category when the diagnosis and location fit.
affiliateOnly.reasonAffiliateFirst: Antifungal claims are drug claims; many patients still need diagnostic confirmation or prescription therapy.
conditionSupport: intertrigo when yeast/fungal features are suspected

affiliateOnly.name: OTC Wart Remover
affiliateOnly.claimSafeCopy: Third-party non-genital wart category when appropriate and used exactly as labeled.
affiliateOnly.reasonAffiliateFirst: Wart-removal claims are drug claims; not for genital, facial, infected, or uncertain lesions.

affiliateOnly.name: Topical Minoxidil
affiliateOnly.claimSafeCopy: Third-party hair regrowth medication category when it fits the clinical picture.
affiliateOnly.reasonAffiliateFirst: Hair regrowth claims are drug claims; pair with visit guidance and safety counseling.

deferOrAvoidAtLaunch.name: Eyelash growth serum
deferOrAvoidAtLaunch.reason: Eyelash growth claims can create drug claims. Keep bimatoprost-style care inside the prescription visit workflow. Avoid cosmetic lash-growth claims.

deferOrAvoidAtLaunch.name: Skin-lightening/bleaching products
deferOrAvoidAtLaunch.reason: Pigment and bleaching claims can trigger drug regulation and additional safety scrutiny. Use visit-based prescription decisions and affiliate SPF first.

deferOrAvoidAtLaunch.name: Anti-aging products claiming collagen, wrinkle removal, regeneration, or lifting
deferOrAvoidAtLaunch.reason: Structure/function anti-aging claims are high risk. Cosmetic copy should stay appearance-focused.

deferOrAvoidAtLaunch.name: Antibacterial/antimicrobial body wash
deferOrAvoidAtLaunch.reason: Antibacterial or infection-prevention claims can make a cleanser a drug. Avoid unless intentionally building an OTC drug product.

deferOrAvoidAtLaunch.name: Supplements as owned line
deferOrAvoidAtLaunch.reason: Delay until substantiation, label review, adverse-event process, DSHEA disclaimer placement, and FDA notification workflow are ready.
